source.sqlReaderQuery:
Select 
a.LeadID,
a.CustomerID,
a.ProductID,
a.DispositionID,
a.LeadSourceID,
a.InboundQueueLogID,
a.BranchID,
a.SalesDistrictID,
a.RankID,
a.LeadSubSourceID,
a.AppointmentID,
a.SalesRep1_EmployeeID,
a.SalesRep2_EmployeeID,
a.CallBack_EmployeeID,
a.PromoterID,
a.LeadNumber,
a.EntryDate,
a.DateEntered,
a.ApptDate,
a.CallBackDate,
a.DateReceived,
a.FollowUpDate,
a.DeferDate,
a.ApptSet,
a.Verified,
a.Confirmed,
a.Issued,
a.NetIssued,
a.Sat,
a.Sold,
a.EverSet,
a.EverVerified,
a.EverIssued,
a.EverNetIssued,
a.EverSat,
a.EverConfirmed,
a.SetBy_EmployeeID,
a.VerifiedBy_EmployeeID,
a.ConfirmedBy_EmployeeID,
a.ApptDuration,
a.GrossSalesAmount,
a.SalesRepSplit,
a.LastCallDate,
a.LastCallResultID,
a.LeadScore_ExpectedValueRank,
a.LeadScore_LogisticRegressionRank,
a.LeadScore_RegressionRank,
a.LeadScore_Initial_LikelihoodToBuy,
a.LeadScore_Initial_LikelySaleAmount,
a.LeadScore_Initial_ExpectedValue,
a.LeadScore_Current_LikelihoodToBuy,
a.LeadScore_Current_LikelySaleAmount,
a.LeadScore_Current_ExpectedValue,
a.Division,
'1' as DeleteInd
from (Select * from OUT.FACT_LEAD_SNAPSHOT where CAST(EntryDate as Date)>='2024-01-01') a left join (Select * from EDW.FACT_LEAD where CAST(EntryDate as Date)>='2024-01-01') b on a.LeadID=b.LeadID where b.LeadID is NULL

scripts.text:
Update OUT.DELETED_LEAD_DETAILS
Set DeleteInd='0'
where LeadID in (Select l.LeadID from EDW.FACT_LEAD l inner join OUT.DELETED_LEAD_DETAILS d on l.LeadID=d.LeadID where CAST(l.EntryDate as Date)>='2024-01-01' and CAST(d.EntryDate as Date)>='2024-01-01')

source.sqlReaderQuery:
Select l.*, '2' as DeleteInd,
    CASE
        WHEN l.ProductID != ls.ProductID THEN 'Product' 
        WHEN l.DispositionID != ls.DispositionID THEN 'Dispo' 
        WHEN l.LeadSourceID != ls.LeadSourceID THEN 'LeadSourceID' 
        WHEN l.InboundQueueLogID != ls.InboundQueueLogID THEN 'InboundQueueLog' 
        WHEN l.BranchID != ls.BranchID THEN 'Branch' 
        WHEN l.SalesDistrictID != ls.SalesDistrictID THEN 'SalesDistrict' 
        WHEN l.RankID != ls.RankID THEN 'Rank' 
        WHEN l.LeadSubSourceID != ls.LeadSubSourceID THEN 'LeadSubSource' 
        WHEN l.AppointmentID != ls.AppointmentID THEN 'AppointmentID' 
        WHEN l.SalesRep1_EmployeeID != ls.SalesRep1_EmployeeID THEN 'Sales Rep 1' 
        WHEN l.SalesRep2_EmployeeID != ls.SalesRep2_EmployeeID THEN 'Sales Rep 2' 
        WHEN l.CallBack_EmployeeID != ls.CallBack_EmployeeID THEN 'CallBack Emp' 
        WHEN l.PromoterID != ls.PromoterID THEN 'Promoter' 
        WHEN l.ApptDate != ls.ApptDate THEN 'ApptDate' 
        WHEN l.CallBackDate != ls.CallBackDate THEN 'CallBack Date' 
        WHEN l.DateReceived != ls.DateReceived THEN 'DateReceived' 
        WHEN l.FollowUpDate != ls.FollowUpDate THEN 'FollowupDate' 
        WHEN l.DeferDate != ls.DeferDate THEN 'Defer Date' 
        WHEN l.ApptSet != ls.ApptSet THEN 'ApptSet' 
        WHEN l.Verified != ls.Verified THEN 'Verified' 
        WHEN l.Confirmed != ls.Confirmed THEN 'Confirmed' 
        WHEN l.Issued != ls.Issued THEN 'Issued' 
        WHEN l.NetIssued != ls.NetIssued THEN 'Net Issued' 
        WHEN l.Sat != ls.Sat THEN 'Sat' 
        WHEN l.Sold != ls.Sold THEN 'Sold' 
        WHEN l.EverSet != ls.EverSet THEN 'EverSet' 
        WHEN l.EverVerified != ls.EverVerified THEN 'EverVerified'  
        WHEN l.EverNetIssued != ls.EverNetIssued THEN 'Ever net Issued'  
        WHEN l.EverSat != ls.EverSat THEN 'Ever Sat'  
        WHEN l.EverConfirmed != ls.EverConfirmed THEN 'Ever Confirmed'  
        WHEN l.SetBy_EmployeeID != ls.SetBy_EmployeeID THEN 'Set by Emp'  
        WHEN l.VerifiedBy_EmployeeID != ls.VerifiedBy_EmployeeID THEN 'Verified by Emp'  
        WHEN l.ConfirmedBy_EmployeeID != ls.ConfirmedBy_EmployeeID THEN 'Confirm by Emp'  
        WHEN l.ApptDuration != ls.ApptDuration THEN 'ApptDuration'  
        WHEN TRY_CAST(l.GrossSalesAmount as FLOAT) != TRY_CAST(ls.GrossSalesAmount as FLOAT) THEN 'Gross Sale Amt'  
        WHEN l.SalesRepSplit != ls.SalesRepSplit THEN 'Sales Rep Split'  
        WHEN l.LastCallDate != ls.LastCallDate THEN 'Last Call Date'  
        WHEN l.LastCallResultID != ls.LastCallResultID THEN 'Last Call Result'
    END as ChangeReason,
    CASE
        WHEN l.ProductID != ls.ProductID THEN ls.ProductID 
        WHEN l.DispositionID != ls.DispositionID THEN ls.DispositionID 
        WHEN l.LeadSourceID != ls.LeadSourceID THEN ls.LeadSourceID
        WHEN l.InboundQueueLogID != ls.InboundQueueLogID THEN ls.InboundQueueLogID 
        WHEN l.BranchID != ls.BranchID THEN ls.BranchID
        WHEN l.SalesDistrictID != ls.SalesDistrictID THEN ls.SalesDistrictID
        WHEN l.RankID != ls.RankID THEN ls.RankID
        WHEN l.LeadSubSourceID != ls.LeadSubSourceID THEN ls.LeadSubSourceID 
        WHEN l.AppointmentID != ls.AppointmentID THEN ls.AppointmentID
        WHEN l.SalesRep1_EmployeeID != ls.SalesRep1_EmployeeID THEN ls.SalesRep1_EmployeeID 
        WHEN l.SalesRep2_EmployeeID != ls.SalesRep2_EmployeeID THEN ls.SalesRep2_EmployeeID
        WHEN l.CallBack_EmployeeID != ls.CallBack_EmployeeID THEN ls.CallBack_EmployeeID 
        WHEN l.PromoterID != ls.PromoterID THEN ls.PromoterID 
        WHEN l.ApptDate != ls.ApptDate THEN CAST(ls.ApptDate as VARCHAR)
        WHEN l.CallBackDate != ls.CallBackDate THEN CAST(ls.CallBackDate as VARCHAR) 
        WHEN l.DateReceived != ls.DateReceived THEN CAST(ls.DateReceived as VARCHAR)
        WHEN l.FollowUpDate != ls.FollowUpDate THEN CAST(ls.FollowupDate as VARCHAR) 
        WHEN l.DeferDate != ls.DeferDate THEN CAST(ls.DeferDate as VARCHAR) 
        WHEN l.ApptSet != ls.ApptSet THEN CAST(ls.ApptSet as VARCHAR) 
        WHEN l.Verified != ls.Verified THEN CAST(ls.Verified as VARCHAR) 
        WHEN l.Confirmed != ls.Confirmed THEN CAST(ls.Confirmed as VARCHAR)
        WHEN l.Issued != ls.Issued THEN CAST(ls.Issued as VARCHAR)
        WHEN l.NetIssued != ls.NetIssued THEN CAST(ls.NetIssued as VARCHAR)
        WHEN l.Sat != ls.Sat THEN CAST(ls.Sat as VARCHAR)
        WHEN l.Sold != ls.Sold THEN CAST(ls.Sold as VARCHAR)
        WHEN l.EverSet != ls.EverSet THEN CAST(ls.EverSet as VARCHAR)
        WHEN l.EverVerified != ls.EverVerified THEN CAST(ls.EverVerified as VARCHAR) 
        WHEN l.EverNetIssued != ls.EverNetIssued THEN CAST(ls.EverNetIssued as VARCHAR)
        WHEN l.EverSat != ls.EverSat THEN CAST(ls.EverSat as VARCHAR)
        WHEN l.EverConfirmed != ls.EverConfirmed THEN CAST(ls.EverConfirmed as VARCHAR)  
        WHEN l.SetBy_EmployeeID != ls.SetBy_EmployeeID THEN ls.SetBy_EmployeeID  
        WHEN l.VerifiedBy_EmployeeID != ls.VerifiedBy_EmployeeID THEN ls.VerifiedBy_EmployeeID  
        WHEN l.ConfirmedBy_EmployeeID != ls.ConfirmedBy_EmployeeID THEN ls.ConfirmedBy_EmployeeID  
        WHEN l.ApptDuration != ls.ApptDuration THEN CAST(ls.ApptDuration as VARCHAR) 
        WHEN TRY_CAST(l.GrossSalesAmount as FLOAT) != TRY_CAST(ls.GrossSalesAmount as FLOAT) THEN CAST(ls.GrossSalesAmount as VARCHAR)
        WHEN l.SalesRepSplit != ls.SalesRepSplit THEN CAST(ls.SalesRepSplit as VARCHAR) 
        WHEN l.LastCallDate != ls.LastCallDate THEN CAST(ls.LastCallDate as VARCHAR)
        WHEN l.LastCallResultID != ls.LastCallResultID THEN ls.LastCallResultID
    END as PreviousValue,
    GETDATE() as ChangeCaptureDate
from EDW.FACT_LEAD l
inner join OUT.FACT_LEAD_SNAPSHOT ls on l.LeadID = ls.LeadID
where
    ISNUMERIC(l.GrossSalesAmount) = 1 AND ISNUMERIC(ls.GrossSalesAmount) = 1 AND
    (
        l.ProductID != ls.ProductID or l.DispositionID != ls.DispositionID or l.LeadSourceID != ls.LeadSourceID or
        l.InboundQueueLogID != ls.InboundQueueLogID or l.BranchID != ls.BranchID or l.SalesDistrictID != ls.SalesDistrictID or
        l.RankID != ls.RankID or l.LeadSubSourceID != ls.LeadSubSourceID or l.AppointmentID != ls.AppointmentID or
        l.SalesRep1_EmployeeID != ls.SalesRep1_EmployeeID or l.SalesRep2_EmployeeID != ls.SalesRep2_EmployeeID or
        l.CallBack_EmployeeID != ls.CallBack_EmployeeID or l.PromoterID != ls.PromoterID or l.ApptDate != ls.ApptDate or
        l.CallBackDate != ls.CallBackDate or l.DateReceived != ls.DateReceived or l.FollowUpDate != ls.FollowUpDate or
        l.DeferDate != ls.DeferDate or l.ApptSet != ls.ApptSet or l.Verified != ls.Verified or l.Confirmed != ls.Confirmed or
        l.Issued != ls.Issued or l.NetIssued != ls.NetIssued or l.Sat != ls.Sat or l.Sold != ls.Sold or l.EverSet != ls.EverSet or
        l.EverVerified != ls.EverVerified or l.EverNetIssued != ls.EverNetIssued or l.EverSat != ls.EverSat or
        l.EverConfirmed != ls.EverConfirmed or l.SetBy_EmployeeID != ls.SetBy_EmployeeID or
        l.VerifiedBy_EmployeeID != ls.VerifiedBy_EmployeeID or l.ConfirmedBy_EmployeeID != ls.ConfirmedBy_EmployeeID or
        l.ApptDuration != ls.ApptDuration or TRY_CAST(l.GrossSalesAmount as FLOAT) != TRY_CAST(ls.GrossSalesAmount as FLOAT) or
        l.SalesRepSplit != ls.SalesRepSplit or l.LastCallDate != ls.LastCallDate or l.LastCallResultID != ls.LastCallResultID
    );

Declare @Counter INT=(Select MAX(Snapshot_Instance) from OUT.FACT_LEAD_SNAPSHOT_HIST)
Select b.*,@counter+1 as Snapshot_Instance from OUT.FACT_LEAD_SNAPSHOT b
